Metadata.title: SharkLian Dev | Senior Full-Stack Engineer Portfolio
Metadata.description: Full-Stack Engineer with 5 years of proven experience (React & Node.js). Specializing in highly interactive frontends and robust API architectures.
Metadata.keywords: Full-Stack Engineer, React, Node.js, TypeScript, Next.js, Web Development, Freelance

og.title: SharkLian Dev | Transforming Complex Logic into Seamless Experiences
og.description: Transforming Complex Business Logic into Seamless Digital Experiences.

Hero.h1: Transforming Complex Business Logic into Seamless Digital Experiences.
Hero.h2: Full-Stack Engineer with 5 years of proven experience (React & Node.js). Specializing in highly interactive frontends, robust API architectures, and scalable database design to build modern solutions for your business.

frontend.title: Frontend Engineering & Interactive Design
frontend.tech: React.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, State Management (Redux/Zustand)
frontend.value: Building high-performance Single Page Applications (SPAs). Focused on responsive design, Core Web Vitals optimization, and complex state management for a flawless user experience.

backend.title: Backend Architecture & API Development
backend.value: Designing secure and maintainable server architectures. Experienced in microservices concepts, Role-Based Access Control (RBAC), and seamless third-party integrations.

database.title: Database Design & System Deployment
database.value: Rigorous relational database normalization to ensure data integrity and query performance. Utilizing Git for stable and transparent development and delivery workflows.

project_a.title: Advanced Image Annotation Tool
project_a.desc: A high-performance image processing tool built for enterprise clients. The frontend leverages Konva.js for complex 2D canvas rendering, layer management, and polygon coordinate calculations, overcoming traditional DOM performance bottlenecks. The NestJS backend provides a robust REST API for handling massive coordinate data storage and authorization.
project_a.achievement_1: Support over 1000 annotation objects per image without lag.
project_a.achievement_2: Reduced manual labor time by 40% for clients.

project_b.title: Custom Admin Dashboard
project_b.desc: Took over and refactored legacy system technical debt. Introduced a modern React architecture with strict TypeScript typing, redesigned the database Schema to resolve slow query issues, and built visual operational data dashboards, significantly improving the management team's decision-making efficiency.
project_b.achievement_2: Successfully implemented Dark Mode and multi-language support (i18n).

step_1.title: Discovery & Scoping
step_1.desc: Deeply understand your business goals, producing clear Specification Requirements (SRS) and technical proposals.

step_2.title: Architecture Design
step_2.desc: Determine the most suitable technology stack (React + Node.js ecosystem), planning API specs and database structures.

step_3.title: Agile Development
step_3.desc: Iterative development with regular progress demos to ensure project direction is precise.

step_4.title: Testing & Delivery
step_4.desc: Rigorous code reviews and performance testing, delivering high-quality source code and deployment documentation.

About.title: About Me
About.content: With nearly 5 years of industry experience, I specialize in building efficient and intuitive digital product interfaces for enterprises. I am dedicated to constructing highly stable and scalable enterprise-grade systems; from refactoring legacy administration backends to developing high-complexity interactive interfaces, I precisely manage development needs across various fields, delivering solutions that balance quality and performance.
About.hero_title:
Focused on creating
exceptional digital experiences
About.hero_subtitle: As a frontend-originating full-stack engineer, I understand that visual presentation is as crucial as underlying architecture. I strive to strike the perfect balance between performance, maintainability, and user experience.
About.frontend_desc: Building smooth, responsive, and highly interactive user interfaces
About.backend_desc: Designing robust, secure, and scalable API services
About.tools_desc: Modern development workflows and environment setup
About.cta_title: Ready to bring your ideas to life?
About.cta_desc: Let's collaborate to build a high-quality digital product that stands out.

ai_panel.title: AI Data Analytics Dashboard
ai_panel.desc: Participated in product architecture and core frontend development from scratch. Built highly interactive data visualization interfaces using Vue3 + ECharts, supporting drag-and-drop customized layouts and real-time AI data streaming via WebSocket with update latency under 100ms.

eip.title: Enterprise Information Portal (EIP)
eip.desc: Responsible for refactoring legacy internal systems. Introduced Vite and Tailwind CSS, solving slow compilation issues (reduced time by 80%). Established robust global state management using Pinia to handle complex Role-Based Access Control (RBAC).

revenue.title: Revenue & Accounting System
revenue.desc: Collaborated deeply with the backend to handle massive cash flow report data. Introduced Virtual Scrolling technology to the frontend, ensuring tables with tens of thousands of records maintain a smooth 60fps scroll, resolving long-standing performance pain points for the business team.

annotation.title: Advanced Image Annotation Tool
annotation.desc: Built high-performance frontend image processing for enterprise clients. Abandoned traditional DOM, entirely adopting Canvas (Konva.js) rendering. Supports real-time dragging, scaling, and coordinate calculation of thousands of polygon label objects without lag.

custom.title: Custom Project Development & Deployment
custom.desc: Handled not only frontend logic but also Node.js (Express/NestJS) API development. Capable of independent work, managing everything from database design and third-party API integration to the final Docker containerization deployment process.
